description_long: This is a large, freestanding commercial-style oven with a robust, rectangular form and a matte black finish. The front features two prominent oven doors, each with a horizontal handle, and a row of six round control knobs above, likely for controlling the burners and oven functions. The cooktop is equipped with six gas burners, each with a visible grate, and the surface appears metallic and durable. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The oven sits on a solid base, slightly raised from the ground, and the overall construction suggests heavy-duty use, suitable for professional kitchens or urban communal spaces. There are no visible windows on the oven doors, and no brand markings or logos are apparent.
description: A large, matte black commercial oven with six burners, two front doors, and a row of control knobs. The design is robust and utilitarian, with no visible windows or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing two oven doors, six control knobs, and the full cooktop with six burners.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid side panel and the depth of the oven.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless back panel, emphasizing the oven's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain side panel and visible cooktop edge.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located above the oven doors and consists of six evenly spaced, round knobs. The knobs are arranged in a single horizontal row, each likely corresponding to a burner or oven function. There are no visible digital displays, buttons, or touchscreens, and no apparent labeling or indicator lights are discernible in the images.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven features two horizontal, bar-style handles mounted on the upper section of each door. The handles are metallic in appearance, slightly protruding, and run parallel to the top edge of the doors, providing a sturdy grip.
